summary: W1625 remains the latest product-facing source checkpoint and consumes the underlying W987 full-data provider directly. Follow-up W1450 inspection proves the current W1450 construction surface is not a closure path: no nullary W716, W717, W984, or W950 component provider exists, and the expected-failure Lean probe exposes the immediate missing goals as right-open closed quotient-cover boundary, source-difference cokernel-pi-zero boundary, relation-pullback provider, target-relation-lift provider, target no-univ data, closed-embedding closedness data, normalized-source-triangulation data, and endpoint-localized-unit data. This is a narrower source-patch-needed handoff, not product success.
obligations_discharged: No new product-facing Lean source obligation is discharged by this handoff checkpoint.
The source inspection narrows the W987 full-data blocker from one W1450 field-data input to eight immediate component obligations surfaced by Lean.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: A W1450 wrapper-only source route is rejected because it merely packages W716/W717/W984/W950 and the current source has no nullary provider for those four records.
A W716-only follow-up is narrowed to MetrizableWppLimitRightOpenClosedQuotientCoverBoundary and MetrizableWppLimitSourceDifferenceCokernelPiZeroBoundary.
A W717-only follow-up is narrowed to ClosedNatTransOrdinaryRelationPullbackProviderW712 and ClosedNatTransOrdinaryTargetRelationLiftsProviderW712.
A W984-only follow-up is narrowed to TargetSurjectiveNoUnivMembershipForTargetProviderW944 and ClosedEmbeddingClosednessDataProviderW973.
A W950-only follow-up is narrowed to NormalizedFixedTargetSourceTriangulationDataProviderW948 and EndpointStrictExactLocalizedUnitDataProviderW949.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.

The original four-task contract is not complete because the W1625 product-data path still requires caller-supplied BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitFullDataProviderW987 data.

No nullary W987 full-data provider, W1450 field-data input, W716 boundary-data provider, W717 relation-data provider, W984 target/closedness provider, or W950 normalized-source/endpoint-localized-unit provider was found in LeanLCAExactChallenge or audit source.
No nullary def/theorem/lemma was found for the eight immediate W1450 leaf goals exposed by the probe.
Typeclass synthesis still does not provide Pretriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA) or IsTriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA).
Typeclass synthesis still does not provide (boundedExactWeakEquivalence MetrizableLCA).HasLeftCalculusOfFractions.
remaining_work: Construct one of the eight immediate W1450 leaf goals from actual mathematical source declarations, or prove a stronger canonical theorem that eliminates the W1450/W987 provider entirely.
Use those leaves to construct W987FieldDataConstructionInputW1450 and then a nullary BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitFullDataProviderW987.
Use the resulting nullary source data to build the bounded-derived stable package and original four-task positive witness.
Run the Tier C review packet and full contract audit before permitting update_goal complete.
